---
title: "Contact and Contributions"
---

This starter site is designed for collaborative refinement.

## What partners can help improve

Partners can contribute by:

- reviewing the wording of individual tool pages,
- adding or replacing photos,
- refining the list of target variables,
- clarifying who the most likely end-users are,
- and improving the practical notes and limitations for each method.

## Priority content requests

The most helpful next contributions are:

1. a preferred image for each tool,
2. confirmation of the key variables measured by each tool,
3. feedback on how mature each tool is for end-user communication,
4. and comments on whether any important toolbox component is still missing.

![](images/contact.png){width="60%" fig-alt="Contact placeholder"}
